name: RxMedCalc
description: Free clinical decision-support calculator suite for doctors, nurses, and medical students. 45+ validated tools across emergency medicine, paediatrics, internal medicine, nephrology, cardiology, neurology, and vitamin/drug dosing. Indian guideline context (NCDC, NHM, IAP, FOGSI). All calculations run client-side — no patient data transmitted.

skills.name: curb65
skills.description: CURB-65 pneumonia severity score. Predicts 30-day mortality and guides hospital admission decisions. BTS/NICE guideline.

skills.name: news2
skills.description: NEWS2 National Early Warning Score 2. Tracks clinical deterioration across all ward patients. RCP UK 2017 guideline.

skills.name: gcs-calculator
skills.description: Glasgow Coma Scale calculator for adult and paediatric patients. Eye, verbal, and motor response scoring.

skills.name: burn-calculator
skills.description: Burn TBSA estimation and Parkland formula fluid resuscitation calculator. ABA guideline.

skills.name: wells-score
skills.description: Wells Score for DVT and Pulmonary Embolism pre-test probability estimation.

skills.name: map-calculator
skills.description: Mean Arterial Pressure calculator with SSC sepsis targets.

skills.name: qsofa-score
skills.description: qSOFA quick Sepsis-related Organ Failure Assessment. Bedside sepsis screening tool. Sepsis-3 (2016) guideline.

skills.name: shock-index
skills.description: Shock Index calculator (HR/SBP ratio) for occult haemodynamic compromise detection.

skills.name: apache2-score
skills.description: APACHE II ICU severity of illness score with mortality prediction.

skills.name: perc-rule
skills.description: PERC Rule for Pulmonary Embolism rule-out in low-risk patients.

skills.name: rass-score
skills.description: Richmond Agitation-Sedation Scale for ICU sedation targeting. Includes PADIS 2018 target ranges and sedative drug guide.

skills.name: sirs-criteria
skills.description: SIRS Criteria calculator for Systemic Inflammatory Response Syndrome. ACCP/SCCM definition.

skills.name: grace-score
skills.description: GRACE Score for ACS risk stratification. Predicts in-hospital and 6-month mortality after acute coronary syndrome. ESC 2020.

skills.name: rabies-scheduler
skills.description: Anti-Rabies Vaccine schedule calculator. Generates precise Day 0/3/7/14/28 dosing dates from exposure date. NCDC India/WHO protocol.

skills.name: arv-dose-calculator
skills.description: Anti-Rabies Vaccine (ARV) dose calculator for intradermal and intramuscular post-exposure protocols. NCDC India/WHO guideline. Note: ARV here means Anti-Rabies Vaccine, not antiretroviral.

skills.name: uip-vaccine
skills.description: Universal Immunisation Programme vaccine tracker for India. NHM India schedule.

skills.name: neonatal-jaundice
skills.description: Neonatal jaundice phototherapy and exchange transfusion threshold calculator. AAP 2022 and IAP guidelines.

skills.name: growth-chart
skills.description: Child growth chart with WHO/IAP weight, height, and BMI Z-scores using LMS Box-Cox method.

skills.name: apgar-score
skills.description: APGAR score calculator for newborn assessment at 1 and 5 minutes with NRP guidance. AAP/AHA.

skills.name: ors
skills.description: ORS rehydration volume calculator. WHO Plan A and Plan B rehydration protocols.

skills.name: pediatric-asthma
skills.description: Paediatric asthma action plan with Green/Yellow/Red zone management. GINA and IAP guidelines.

skills.name: milestones
skills.description: Child developmental milestones tracker for ages 0–5 years with red flags. CDC and IAP guidelines.

skills.name: holliday-segar
skills.description: Holliday-Segar maintenance fluid calculator using the 4-2-1 rule for paediatric patients.

skills.name: pediatric-weight
skills.description: Paediatric weight estimation calculator for emergency dosing. APLS and Nelson formulas.

skills.name: egfr-calculator
skills.description: eGFR calculator using CKD-EPI 2021 race-free equation, Cockcroft-Gault, and MDRD. KDIGO 2021.

skills.name: creatinine-clearance
skills.description: Creatinine clearance calculator using Cockcroft-Gault formula for drug dose adjustment.

skills.name: hba1c-converter
skills.description: HbA1c bidirectional unit converter — % to mmol/mol and estimated Average Glucose. IFCC and ADA.

skills.name: corrected-calcium
skills.description: Corrected calcium calculator for hypoalbuminaemia using Payne formula. NICE guideline.

skills.name: anion-gap
skills.description: Albumin-corrected anion gap and Delta ratio calculator for acid-base interpretation.

skills.name: meld-score
skills.description: MELD score and Child-Pugh calculator for liver disease severity and UNOS transplant scoring.

skills.name: sodium-correction
skills.description: Sodium correction calculator — free water deficit and safe correction rate using Adrogue-Madias formula.

skills.name: fena-calculator
skills.description: Fractional Excretion of Sodium (FeNa) calculator for pre-renal vs intrinsic renal failure differentiation.

skills.name: ktv-dialysis
skills.description: Kt/V haemodialysis adequacy calculator. KDOQI guideline.

skills.name: cha2ds2-vasc
skills.description: CHA₂DS₂-VASc stroke risk score for atrial fibrillation. ESC 2020 and AHA guideline.

skills.name: has-bled
skills.description: HAS-BLED bleeding risk score for anticoagulation decisions in atrial fibrillation. ESC guideline.

skills.name: ascvd-risk
skills.description: ASCVD 10-year cardiovascular risk calculator using ACC/AHA Pooled Cohort Equations.

skills.name: nihss-calculator
skills.description: NIH Stroke Scale (NIHSS) calculator for neurological deficit quantification in stroke. ASA/WSO.

skills.name: abcd2-score
skills.description: ABCD2 score for short-term stroke risk prediction after TIA.

skills.name: hunt-hess
skills.description: Hunt and Hess grading scale for subarachnoid haemorrhage severity.

skills.name: phq9-gad7
skills.description: PHQ-9 depression and GAD-7 anxiety screening tools with severity interpretation.

skills.name: spirometry
skills.description: Spirometry PFT calculator using Jindal 1994 Indian reference equations. FEV1, FVC, FEV1/FVC interpretation.

skills.name: mentzer-index-calculator
skills.description: Mentzer Index calculator for differentiating thalassaemia from iron deficiency anaemia using MCV and RBC count.

skills.name: biomedical-waste
skills.description: Biomedical Waste Management guide for India — colour coding, segregation, and disposal per BMW Rules 2016 (MoEF&CC).

skills.name: doses
skills.description: Drug dosing calculator — weight-based and age-based dosing for antibiotics, analgesics, emergency drugs, steroids, and GI medications used in Indian clinical practice.

skills.name: vitamin-d-calculator
skills.description: Vitamin D (cholecalciferol) dosing calculator. Loading dose (60,000 IU/week × 8 weeks), Stoss therapy (300k–600k IU), maintenance, and paediatric weight-based dosing.

skills.name: b1-thiamine-calculator
skills.description: Vitamin B1 thiamine dosing calculator. SIGN protocol for Wernicke encephalopathy (500 mg IV TDS). Includes benfotiamine dosing for neuropathy.
